examples: We wear plimsolls when doing physical exercises.
We wear plimsolls when doing physical exercises at school.
Feeling vulnerable in my plimsolls, I swapped them for Wellington boots bought at one of the settlements along the way.
They were named plimsolls in 1876 by a salesman for the Liverpool Rubber Company.
What used to be called plimsolls have been transformed into vastly expensive trainers.
